since_last: 63% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.63%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 63% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -0.37% · Gold +0.29% · Nasdaq100 -1.87%. 63% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.63%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.63%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.22%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SAP is the standout at +5.57%
cards.body: Leaders: SAP +5.57%, DLR +4.04%, UPST +3.26%, INTC +2.76%, PUBM +2.44%. Laggards: SKHY -2.77%, CGNX -1.51%, BABA -1.49%, MU -1.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.87% at $117.21
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.87% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
